title: The Billionaire Funding France’s Far Right
summary_full: Pierre-Édouard Stérin is financing projects to make France less Muslim, more Catholic and more capitalist. He says his program has trained thousands running for municipal office on Sunday.
summary_public: Pierre-Édouard Stérin is financing projects to make France less Muslim, more Catholic and more capitalist. He says his program has trained thousands running for municipal office on Sunday.

FR.label: negative
FR.evidence: financing projects to make France less Muslim, more Catholic
